segments.text: Hello, namaskar. I am Dr. Meera speaking from Tata AIG Insurance. Can I speak to Ms. Ankita Kailash Marney?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Would you prefer to speak in Hindi or another language?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: This call is being recorded for quality and audit purposes. As per the process, we need to conduct a telephonic medical verification, in which you will be asked some verification questions related to your health and habits. It will take 10 minutes. Can we continue the call?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Please note that any information you provide on this call will be considered part of your application. Once the proposal is approved, a legal relationship will be formed between you and Tata AIG Life Insurance. Any false information or false statement or reply can affect your contract and your policy may be canceled or the claim may be rejected.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: We request you to answer all questions thoughtfully and correctly.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Can you tell me the last four digits of your Aadhaar card?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Wait a minute, I'll tell you.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Which city are you speaking from?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Which city are you speaking from?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: I am from Pune, Pune, Maharashtra.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Now, 20 questions related to your health and habits will be asked. At the end of each question, you have to answer yes or no. If you do not understand any word, you can ask, and its meaning will be explained to you. It is important to answer all questions. Some questions may seem a little inappropriate.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: In the last 24 months, have you used smoking, tobacco, or any nicotine product?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Has a doctor ever advised you to reduce or stop alcohol?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Do you have a habit of drinking alcohol?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Any use of drugs or narcotics not prescribed by a doctor?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, I have never taken anything like that.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: 56.65 or 56, something like that. It will be 56.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Are you taking any medication or receiving treatment for any of these diseases: high or low blood pressure, increased cholesterol, triglycerides, or lipids?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Chest pain, heaviness, restlessness, heart attack, any trouble with heart arteries or diseases, childhood heart disease, rapid heartbeat, shortness of breath while sleeping, or any heart condition?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Cancer, carcinoma in situ, pre-cancerous condition, leukemia, enlarged glands, any wound on the skin, dysplasia, leukoplakia, sarcoma, tumor, polyp, nodule, cyst, lump, or any growth in your body?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Diabetes, high blood sugar, sugar in urine, hyperthyroid, hypothyroid, or any other thyroid or endocrine disease?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Asthma, bronchitis, sinusitis, TB, pneumonia, persistent cough, shortness of breath while sleeping, swollen lungs, or any lung-related trouble?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Hepatitis, hepatitis carrier, fatty liver, liver cirrhosis, jaundice, alcoholic liver disease, or any liver disorder?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Anemia, poor blood formation, systemic lupus erythematosus, or any blood or immune system-related trouble?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Anxiety, depression, seizures, paralytic attack, weakness in hands and feet, stroke, transient ischemic attack, multiple sclerosis, Parkinson's, polio disease, Alzheimer's, or any brain or mental health-related disease?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Frequent acidity in the stomach, stomach acid coming into the mouth, stomach ulcer, persistent indigestion, gas problem, Barrett's esophagus, atrophic gastritis, Crohn's disease, ulcerative colitis, pancreatitis, or any stomach or intestinal related trouble?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Kidney stones, gallstones, kidney or urinary tract infection, blood or protein in urine, chronic kidney disease, kidney failure, piles, fistula, or any kidney, bladder, ureter, or urinary system-related trouble?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Persistent back pain, joint pain, gout, slip disc, muscular dystrophy, deformity, any trouble with the spine, or any muscle, bone, joint, ligament, or spine problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Any vision loss, blurred vision, double vision, cataract, or cataract operation?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Any hearing loss, impaired hearing, difficulty speaking, heavy voice, pain while swallowing food, pus discharge from ear, or any ear, nose, or throat-related trouble?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Besides this, is there any other information related to your health and habits that you think would be necessary during the policy processing?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: In the last five years, any medical condition for which there was an abnormal medical finding or any scan such as X-ray, ultrasound, MRI, CT, biopsy, ECG, endoscopy, blood or urine test that was abnormal?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Any continuous medication or treatment for more than two weeks, or any hospitalization for diagnosis or treatment?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Any trouble in your daily activities or leave from work for more than two weeks due to health reasons?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Childhood diseases or hereditary illnesses like cerebral palsy, Down syndrome, or polio?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: This question is a little sensitive. Have you or your husband ever needed a test, treatment, medical advice, or counseling for sexually transmitted diseases like HIV AIDS?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Sudden weight gain, weight loss, or any symptom for which you are awaiting medical advice, treatment, or surgery?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Have you ever consulted your doctor for breast lump, breast disease, irregular painful menstruation, abnormal Pap smear, or any breast, gynecological condition, vaginal disorder, or uterus, ovary, fallopian tube disorder?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Do you believe all the answers you have given to the questions are completely correct?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: These will be part of our policy record. Thank you for your information and cooperation. Have a good day.
segments.speaker: doctor
